services.title: Manicure
services.body: We use premium products with over 1,000 gel colours to cover every need — nail extensions, nail care and spa treatments — blending luxury and creativity for the look you want.

services.title: Pedicure
services.body: The ultimate spa pedicure: nail shaping, cuticle care, gentle exfoliation, a relaxing massage and deep hydration for soft, rejuvenated feet. Add a paraffin treatment for extra relaxation.

services.title: Lash Extensions

services.title: Waxing
services.body: Our waxing technique keeps you comfortable for a pain-free experience — from eyebrows to a full bikini wax, we've got you covered.

servicesPage.heading: Our Services
servicesPage.intro: Premium products, over 1,000 gel colours and 20+ years of expertise.

about.heading: Why Choose Us
body: Because we make your safety and hygiene our priority. At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa we take your health seriously: we keep three sanitation stations stocked with disinfectant, tools are sterilized after every use, and our manicure stations have dust collectors that protect both clients and staff.

Because we offer professional, exceptional service. With over 20 years of experience in nail care and beauty, our welcoming, professional technicians know how to deliver the high-quality results you're looking for, with satisfaction guaranteed.
Because at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, you are family. Our team's warm welcome makes you feel right at home — every client is part of our extended family.

manicure.title: Manicure in Laval
manicure.heroAlt: Gel manicure with soft neutral polish at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, Laval
manicure.intro: Treat your hands to a manicure at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, inside CF Carrefour Laval. With more than 20 years of experience and over 1,000 gel colours to choose from, our technicians shape, smooth and finish your nails exactly the way you want — from a clean, natural look to bold nail art and full extensions. We use premium products and a meticulous, unhurried process so your manicure looks flawless and lasts.
included: Hand soak, exfoliation and a relaxing massage
Your choice of regular, gel or dip powder finish
addons: Nail extensions (gel or acrylic) for added length
Custom nail art and French finish
Paraffin hand treatment for extra hydration
manicure.duration: About 45–60 minutes, depending on finish and add-ons.
manicure.hygiene: Your safety comes first. We keep three sanitation stations stocked with disinfectant, sterilize every tool after each use, and fit our manicure stations with dust collectors that protect both clients and staff. It's the standard that has made Sans Souci a trusted name in Laval for over 20 years.

faq.q: How long does a gel manicure last?
faq.a: A gel manicure typically lasts two to three weeks without chipping. Dip powder can last even longer. We'll recommend the finish that best fits your routine.
Yes. We offer gel and acrylic extensions to add length and strength, finished in any of our 1,000+ colours or with custom nail art.
Walk-ins are welcome, but booking online or calling (450) 505-6450 guarantees your preferred time, especially on evenings and weekends.

manicure.metaDescription: Gel, dip and classic manicures with 1000+ colours at CF Carrefour Laval. 20+ years of expertise. Book online or call (450) 505-6450 — from $50.

pedicure.title: Pedicure in Laval
pedicure.heroAlt: Relaxing spa pedicure in progress at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, Laval
pedicure.intro: Our spa pedicure is the ultimate reset for tired feet. At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa in CF Carrefour Laval, each pedicure pairs careful nail and skin care with a genuinely relaxing experience — a warm soak, gentle exfoliation and a massage that leaves your feet soft, smooth and rejuvenated. Add a paraffin treatment when you want to take the relaxation a step further.
included: Nail shaping and thorough cuticle care
Gentle exfoliation to remove rough, dry skin
Deep hydration and your choice of polish
addons: Gel polish for a longer-lasting finish
Callus smoothing for heels and pressure points
pedicure.hygiene: We take hygiene seriously: three sanitation stations stocked with disinfectant, tools sterilized after every single use, and a spotless setup for every guest. It's the care that keeps Laval clients coming back for over 20 years.

faq.q: What makes a spa pedicure different?
faq.a: Beyond shaping and polish, a spa pedicure includes exfoliation, a relaxing massage and deep hydration — and you can add a paraffin treatment for even softer skin.

faq.q: Can I get gel polish on a pedicure?
faq.a: Yes. Gel polish keeps toes looking fresh for weeks and is a popular choice before vacations and sandal season.

faq.q: How often should I get a pedicure?
faq.a: Every four to six weeks keeps feet healthy and smooth, though many clients come more often in summer.

pedicure.metaTitle: Spa Pedicure in Laval | Sans Souci Ongles & Spa
pedicure.metaDescription: Relaxing spa pedicures with exfoliation, massage and paraffin at CF Carrefour Laval. 20+ years of expertise. Book online — from $40.

lash-extensions.title: Lash Extensions in Laval
lash-extensions.heroAlt: Close-up of natural-looking lash extensions applied at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, Laval
lash-extensions.intro: Wake up ready with lash extensions from Sans Souci Ongles & Spa at CF Carrefour Laval. We offer 2D, 3D and Hybrid sets, each tailored to your eye shape and the look you want — from a soft, natural enhancement to full, dramatic volume. Our careful application protects your natural lashes while giving you length and fullness that lasts.
included: Consultation to choose the right style for your eyes
Aftercare guidance to protect your lashes
addons: Lash refills to maintain a full look
lash-extensions.duration: About 60–120 minutes for a full set, depending on style.
lash-extensions.hygiene: Eyes deserve extra care. We work in a clean, controlled setup with sterilized tools and disinfected stations, following the same strict standards that have earned our Laval salon its reputation over 20+ years.

faq.q: How long do lash extensions last?
faq.a: A full set lasts the natural growth cycle of your lashes — usually six to eight weeks. A refill every two to three weeks keeps them looking full.

faq.q: What's the difference between 2D, 3D and Hybrid?
faq.a: 2D and 3D refer to how many extensions are fanned onto each natural lash for added volume; Hybrid blends classic and volume techniques for a textured, natural-yet-full look.

faq.q: Will extensions damage my natural lashes?
faq.a: Applied correctly, they don't. Our technicians match the weight to your natural lashes and share aftercare so your own lashes stay healthy.

lash-extensions.metaTitle: Lash Extensions in Laval | Sans Souci Ongles & Spa
lash-extensions.metaDescription: 2D, 3D and Hybrid lash extensions tailored to you at CF Carrefour Laval. Natural to dramatic. Book online — from $70.

waxing.title: Waxing in Laval
waxing.heroAlt: Calm, clean waxing treatment room at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, Laval
waxing.intro: Smooth, comfortable and quick — our waxing service covers everything from eyebrow shaping to a full bikini wax. At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa in CF Carrefour Laval, our technique is designed to keep you as comfortable as possible for a fast, low-stress experience, with results that last far longer than shaving.
included: A technique focused on comfort and speed
Smooth results that last weeks, not days
addons: Brow tint to complete your shape
Combine areas in one visit to save time
waxing.duration: From about 10 minutes (brows) to 45 minutes (larger areas).
waxing.hygiene: We never compromise on cleanliness: disinfected stations, single-use applicators where appropriate, and tools sterilized after every use — the same strict standard across everything we do at Sans Souci.

faq.a: Most clients stay smooth for three to four weeks, since waxing removes hair from the root rather than the surface.

faq.q: How long should hair be before waxing?
faq.a: About a quarter-inch (roughly two to three weeks of growth) lets the wax grip properly for the cleanest result.
There's a brief sensation, but our technique is designed to minimize discomfort, and it eases with regular visits.

waxing.metaTitle: Waxing in Laval | Sans Souci Ongles & Spa
waxing.metaDescription: Eyebrow to full-body waxing with a comfort-first technique at CF Carrefour Laval. Smooth results that last. Book online — from $15.
